name: qtk
notes: opencode-only TypeScript plugin (tool.execute.after hook). Cache-safe: rewrites tool OUTPUT only, never conversation history. 9 built-in TS compressors (git-status, git-log, ls, rg/grep, pytest, cargo, read-tool, grep-tool, glob-tool) + user TOML DSL filters (RTK-compatible format, hot-reload, fail-open per-file) + optional Rust sidecar qtk-core for heavy parsers (JUnit XML, terraform plan, kubectl -o yaml/json, cargo --message-format=json). DSL pipeline: pass_through_if → strip → dedupe → match → group_by → template → header/footer → truncate. Session dedup cache (SHA-256). Circuit breaker (auto-disable after 3 failures). Savings exporter to .opencode/qtk-savings.json for gmux/Tauri/PWA dashboards. Explicitly downstream of RTK; imports RTK filter corpus via scripts/import-rtk-filters.ts.
